title: Pink Shredded Tissue Paper 100g, Soft Shredded Paper for Gift Boxes, Hampers, Bags, Birthday, Wedding, Anniversary, Christmas and All Occasions
features: 【Create the Perfect Unboxing Experience】This pink shredded paper is the ideal filler for gift boxes, hampers, and baskets. It provides excellent cushioning to protect fragile items while creating a soft, luxurious, and surprise reveal.

【The Essential Hamper Filler】A must-have for creating stunning gift hampers. Use it to nestle bottles, gourmet foods, and delicate gifts securely. It conceals the hamper base and adds a professional, high-end touch that recipients love.

【Almost Perfect for All Celebrations】Be ready for every occasion! This vibrant pink paper shred is perfect for Christmas hampers, Easter baskets, Mother's Day gifts, birthday presents, baby showers basekts, Valentine's Day gifts, and wedding favours, adding a festive touch.

【Fluffy Pink Shreds】Our unique soft shredded tissue paper are fluffy and separate easily, refusing to clump together. This makes it quick and effortless to create a full, voluminous look in your gift packaging.

【Versatile Gift Wrapping & Decoration】Beyond filling boxes and hampers, use this shredded pink tissue for craft projects, party table centrepieces, and vase filler. It's a versatile decorative paper shred for countless creative uses.
description: Product Description Create Moments That Are Remembered Enocent – Where the Art of Giving Begins We believe every gift tells a story. Let our shredded tissue paper set the scene for yours. Discover the effortless elegance that turns your thoughtful gifts into unforgettable presentations. Product Details & Product Specifications Type Pink Shredded Paper Colour Pink Size 100g Texture Soft, fluffy strands Ideal for Gift Boxes | Hampers | Gift Bags | Easter Baskets | Luxury Gift Baskets | Valentine's Day Gifts | Wedding Favours | Christmas Gifts | Birthday Presents | Anniversary Presents | Mother's Day | Baby Shower | Special Occasions | Product Packaging | Small Business Crafted for a Luxurious Feel & Flawless Presentation We’ve selected a premium tissue paper that delivers a soft, fluffy texture, setting it apart from ordinary shredded fillers. This soft shredded paper acts as a protective cloud for delicate items, from fine jewellery to cherished keepsakes, ensuring they arrive in perfect condition while adding a tangible sense of luxury. Create Stunning Gift Presentations with Ease Elevate your gift-giving instantly. Simply place this soft shredded paper into your gift box or hamper before adding the present. It acts as the perfect hamper straw filling, adding volume, colour, and a professional finish that impresses every time. Endless Creative Possibilities Gift wrapping and box filling (e.g., shredded paper for gift boxes) Hamper and basket stuffing (e.g., hamper stuffing filler, shredded paper for hampers) Themed parties and events (e.g., wedding confetti, Christmas decorations) Craft projects and DIY decorations Baby shower favours or Easter egg hunts Present Gifts Beautifully with Enocent Shredded Tissue Paper
